blocks.text: Match preview: England face India in 1st ODI (ODI) on Tue, 14 Jul, 2026, 3:30 pm at Edgbaston Birmingham. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Overcast · High 27°C / Low 14°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 21 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
